meta.title: The Syrian War and Terror in Europe
meta.description: Lee Smith, Benjamin Haddad, Laure Mandeville, Simond de Galbert, and  Christopher Caldwell discuss the Paris attacks, security in the West, and  the ongoing crisis in Syria.
